summary: Iteration 154 - Mira Chat UX Testing. Tested markdown rendering, cart z-index, and WhatsApp button placement. Markdown renders correctly (3 bold elements found, no raw ** characters). Cart sidebar z-index (10001) is higher than Mira (9999) - cart appears above Mira correctly. ISSUE: Mobile footer still has 'Chat on WhatsApp' button that should be removed per requirements.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile footer has 'Chat on WhatsApp' button (lines 63-72) that should be removed. WhatsApp should only be in left floating Ask Concierge stack.

action_items: Remove 'Chat on WhatsApp' button from mobile footer in Footer.jsx (lines 63-72)
critical_code_review_comments: ReactMarkdown is correctly imported and used in MiraChatWidget.jsx (line 23, 949-959)
Sheet component z-index correctly set to 10001 in sheet.jsx (line 28)
Mira widget z-index is 9999 (line 756 in MiraChatWidget.jsx)
Mobile footer WhatsApp CTA button still exists at lines 63-72 in Footer.jsx - needs removal
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira chat markdown rendering is working. Cart z-index fix is working. Mobile footer still has WhatsApp button that needs removal. Desktop footer has WhatsApp icon in social row which may be acceptable.
